title: App keeps crashing
creator: michelleishappyp12
content:
Mail.com support recommended that I install Thunderbird to clean out my inbox. Things went perfectly and I managed to delete 20,000. Then the app just STOPPED. It wouldn't delete any more. I emptied my email's trash, restarted my phone twice, and cleared the cache several times. The app is just inoperable.

Please help! I have 265,000 more emails to delete.
metadata: ;useragent:Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/149.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36;tb_version:19.2;os:Android

title: Save all attachments not working
creator: michaelharvey1
content: There are two pdf files attached to an email I received. When selecting view all and then save all, one file gets saved with the name of the other file, and a zero byte file is created with correct name. The other file is not saved. This erroneous behaviour is repeatable.
